HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION

MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Natalie Bassler, Esq., Law Office of Natalie Bassler, nataliebassler@gmail.com Specially appearing for for Plaintiff.
Silvia Vanegas, Pro per Defendant.

Hearing is held. Discussed, not ARGUED. The Court rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR, LLC HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION denied.

Judgment Debor is to pay $100.00 per pay period.

Order to be prepared by court.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk; W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/HEK)
